ac_text: Required fields order date, customer, and at least one line item must be present.
title: Order is created successfully when order date, customer, and one line item are provided
classification_rationale: Functional is appropriate because this test validates the single acceptance criterion through the UI without crossing multiple systems.
preconditions: Application is deployed and accessible in the UAT environment.
User account exists with role Sales_User and has create permission on Order Management.
Customer record exists with Customer ID CUST-10045 and status Active.
Product record exists with Product Code SKU-1001 and status Active.
Order Management module is configured to allow order creation with required fields order date, customer, and line items.
steps: Open the Create Order page.
Enter order date 2026-04-10.
Select customer CUST-10045.
Add line item SKU-1001 with quantity 2.
Click the Save button.
expected_result: The order is created successfully. A new order number is displayed. The saved order contains order date 2026-04-10, customer CUST-10045, and one line item for SKU-1001 with quantity 2.

completeness.reason: Has preconditions, steps, test data, and expected result

defect_detection.reason: Primarily happy-path coverage

Select customer CUST-10045.

expected_result: The order is not saved. An inline validation message is displayed for Order Date stating that the field is required. No order number is generated.
